+            rics.append(0.0 if np.isnan(rc) else rc)

+    imean = np.mean(ics) if ics else 0.0

+    return imean, (imean/istd if istd > 0 else 0.0), (np.mean(rics) if rics else 0.0), len(ics)

+

+def find_best_ic_iter(model, X_v, y_v, mtype='lgb', step=20):

+    best_ic, best_n = -1, 1

+    max_n = model.current_iteration() if mtype == 'lgb' else model.tree_count_

+    for n in range(step, max_n + 1, step):

+        p = model.predict(X_v, num_iteration=n) if mtype == 'lgb' else model.predict(X_v, ntree_start=0, ntree_end=n)

+        ic, _, _, _ = compute_daily_ic(p, y_v.values, X_v.index)

+        if ic > best_ic:

+            best_ic, best_n = ic, n

+    for n in range(max(1, best_n - step + 1), min(max_n + 1, best_n + step)):

+        p = model.predict(X_v, num_iteration=n) if mtype == 'lgb' else model.predict(X_v, ntree_start=0, ntree_end=n)

+        ic, _, _, _ = compute_daily_ic(p, y_v.values, X_v.index)

+        if ic > best_ic:

+            best_ic, best_n = ic, n

+    return best_n, best_ic

+

+# ============ LightGBM Model 1 ============

+print('\n=== LGB Model 1 (Qlib-like) ===')

+dt1 = lgb.Dataset(X_train, label=y_train)

+dv1 = lgb.Dataset(X_valid, label=y_valid, reference=dt1)

+p1 = {

+    'objective': 'regression', 'metric': 'mae', 'boosting_type': 'gbdt',

+    'num_leaves': 64, 'learning_rate': 0.01, 'feature_fraction': 0.7,

+    'bagging_fraction': 0.7, 'bagging_freq': 5, 'lambda_l1': 0, 'lambda_l2': 0,

+    'min_data_in_leaf': 200, 'max_depth': 6, 'verbose': -1, 'seed': 42, 'num_threads': 8,

+}

+m1 = lgb.train(p1, dt1, num_boost_round=3000, valid_sets=[dv1], valid_names=['valid'],

+    callbacks=[lgb.early_stopping(300), lgb.log_evaluation(500)])

+bi1, _ = find_best_ic_iter(m1, X_valid, y_valid, 'lgb', 20)

+pred1 = m1.predict(X_valid, num_iteration=bi1)

+ic1, icir1, ric1, _ = compute_daily_ic(pred1, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+print(f'LGB1: iter={bi1}, IC={ic1:.4f}, ICIR={icir1:.4f}, RankIC={ric1:.4f}')

+m1.save_model('checkpoints/lgb1.txt')

+

+# ============ LightGBM Model 2 ============

+print('\n=== LGB Model 2 (More Regularized) ===')

+dt2 = lgb.Dataset(X_train, label=y_train)

+dv2 = lgb.Dataset(X_valid, label=y_valid, reference=dt2)

+p2 = {

+    'objective': 'regression', 'metric': 'mae', 'boosting_type': 'gbdt',

+    'num_leaves': 128, 'learning_rate': 0.005, 'feature_fraction': 0.5,

+    'bagging_fraction': 0.7, 'bagging_freq': 5, 'lambda_l1': 2.0, 'lambda_l2': 5.0,

+    'min_data_in_leaf': 300, 'max_depth': 8, 'verbose': -1, 'seed': 123, 'num_threads': 8,

+}

+m2 = lgb.train(p2, dt2, num_boost_round=3000, valid_sets=[dv2], valid_names=['valid'],

+    callbacks=[lgb.early_stopping(300), lgb.log_evaluation(500)])

+bi2, _ = find_best_ic_iter(m2, X_valid, y_valid, 'lgb', 20)

+pred2 = m2.predict(X_valid, num_iteration=bi2)

+ic2, icir2, ric2, _ = compute_daily_ic(pred2, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+print(f'LGB2: iter={bi2}, IC={ic2:.4f}, ICIR={icir2:.4f}, RankIC={ric2:.4f}')

+m2.save_model('checkpoints/lgb2.txt')

+

+# ============ LightGBM Model 3 (Huber) ============

+print('\n=== LGB Model 3 (Huber loss) ===')

+dt3 = lgb.Dataset(X_train, label=y_train)

+dv3 = lgb.Dataset(X_valid, label=y_valid, reference=dt3)

+p3 = {

+    'objective': 'huber', 'metric': 'mae', 'boosting_type': 'gbdt',

+    'num_leaves': 64, 'learning_rate': 0.01, 'feature_fraction': 0.7,

+    'bagging_fraction': 0.7, 'bagging_freq': 5, 'lambda_l1': 0, 'lambda_l2': 0,

+    'min_data_in_leaf': 200, 'max_depth': 6, 'alpha': 0.02,

+    'verbose': -1, 'seed': 456, 'num_threads': 8,

+}

+m3 = lgb.train(p3, dt3, num_boost_round=3000, valid_sets=[dv3], valid_names=['valid'],

+    callbacks=[lgb.early_stopping(300), lgb.log_evaluation(500)])

+bi3, _ = find_best_ic_iter(m3, X_valid, y_valid, 'lgb', 20)

+pred3 = m3.predict(X_valid, num_iteration=bi3)

+ic3, icir3, ric3, _ = compute_daily_ic(pred3, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+print(f'LGB3: iter={bi3}, IC={ic3:.4f}, ICIR={icir3:.4f}, RankIC={ric3:.4f}')

+m3.save_model('checkpoints/lgb3.txt')

+

+# ============ CatBoost ============

+print('\n=== CatBoost ===')

+train_pool = cb.Pool(X_train, y_train)

+valid_pool = cb.Pool(X_valid, y_valid)

+cb_m = cb.CatBoostRegressor(

+    iterations=3000, learning_rate=0.01, depth=8, l2_leaf_reg=5,

+    random_seed=42, loss_function='MAE', eval_metric='MAE',

+    early_stopping_rounds=300, verbose=500, thread_count=8,

+)

+cb_m.fit(train_pool, eval_set=valid_pool)

+bi_cb, _ = find_best_ic_iter(cb_m, X_valid, y_valid, 'cb', 20)

+pred_cb = cb_m.predict(X_valid, ntree_start=0, ntree_end=bi_cb)

+ic_cb, icir_cb, ric_cb, _ = compute_daily_ic(pred_cb, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+print(f'CB: iter={bi_cb}, IC={ic_cb:.4f}, ICIR={icir_cb:.4f}, RankIC={ric_cb:.4f}')

+cb_m.save_model('checkpoints/cb.cbm')

+

+# ============ Ensemble ============

+print('\n=== Ensemble ===')

+all_preds = [pred1, pred2, pred3, pred_cb]

+all_ics = [ic1, ic2, ic3, ic_cb]

+n_models = len(all_preds)

+

+results = {}

+

+# Single models

+for i, (nm, ic_v) in enumerate(zip(['lgb1','lgb2','lgb3','cb'], all_ics)):

+    w = np.zeros(n_models); w[i] = 1.0

+    results[nm] = (ic_v, w, False)

+

+# Average

+pred_avg = np.mean(all_preds, axis=0)

+ic_avg, _, _, _ = compute_daily_ic(pred_avg, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+results['avg'] = (ic_avg, np.ones(n_models)/n_models, False)

+

+# IC-weighted

+w_ic = np.array(all_ics); w_ic = w_ic / w_ic.sum()

+pred_wic = sum(w_ic[i]*all_preds[i] for i in range(n_models))

+ic_wic, _, _, _ = compute_daily_ic(pred_wic, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+results['ic_w'] = (ic_wic, w_ic, False)

+

+# Rank average

+rank_preds = [rankdata(p)/len(p) for p in all_preds]

+pred_rank = np.mean(rank_preds, axis=0)

+ic_rank, _, _, _ = compute_daily_ic(pred_rank, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+results['rank_avg'] = (ic_rank, np.ones(n_models)/n_models, True)

+

+# Rank IC-weighted

+pred_rwic = sum(w_ic[i]*rank_preds[i] for i in range(n_models))
